data.title: Immutable introduces Mintory, a community for player-driven growth, with the launch of the Sharing Hero NFT in 2025.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Sydney, Immutable unveiled Mintory, a game economy community aimed at fostering player-driven growth, engagement, and rewards in connected game experiences. As the top platform for next-gen games, Immutable introduced this new venture to enhance interactions within the gaming community. Mintory will provide players with opportunities to engage and prosper in various games while offering valuable rewards.

data.title: Hyperscale Data holds 514.9655 Bitcoin, worth over $50 million, exceeding market cap. $30.5 million cash for more Bitcoin.
data.description: As of December 19, 2025, Hyperscale Data, Inc. possessed around $50 million in cash and restricted cash. Furthermore, $30.5 million of this amount was designated for upcoming acquisitions of Bitcoin. The company, trading on NYSE American under the symbol GPUS, is a prominent artificial intelligence ("AI") data center based in Las Vegas.

data.title: China Yuchai International Limited appoints Ms. Jiang Fei as Director from Dec. 23, 2025.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, China Yuchai International Limited (NYSE: CYD) disclosed that Ms. Jiang Fei has been appointed as a Director by the Company's Board of Directors. The appointment is effective immediately. China Yuchai welcomes Ms. Jiang Fei to her new role on the Board.

data.title: Inaugural "PropTech Startup Showdown" at SXSW 2026 offers founders chance to compete for $5K and industry exposure.
data.description: Entrepreneurs are encouraged to vie for a prize of $5,000, along with the opportunity for significant industry recognition and to present pioneering real estate technology on a prominent global innovation platform. The event will take place in Austin, Texas on December 23, 2025. The competition is open to all visionaries and will be hosted by Realtor.com® and the National Association of Realtors, offering a chance for founders to showcase their innovations to a wide audience.

data.title: Lucidean secures $18 million in Seed funding led by Entrada Ventures and KDT, appoints Dr. James Raring as CEO for advancing optical links.
data.description: A Santa Barbara–based AI interconnect company, Lucidean, has welcomed Dr. James Raring as their new Chief Executive Officer, and has recently secured an impressive $18 million in Seed financing. This funding round was co-led by Entrada Ventures and Koch Disruptive Technologies (KDT), alongside contributions from Foothill Ventures, M Ventures, Cerberus Ventures, and Raptor Group. This influx of capital signifies a significant milestone for Lucidean as it continues to pioneer coherent optical links for data centers.

data.title: Xcimer Energy updates US Energy Sec. and Rep. in Denver laser bay on progress in commercializing laser fusion, testing highest-energy KrF laser.
data.description: Xcimer Energy Inc. in Denver hosted U.S. Energy Sec. Chris Wright and U.S. Rep. Gabe Evans for a technology briefing at their laser bay. The company recently achieved a milestone by finalizing the primary component of its prototype laser system. Additionally, Xcimer started trials on the most powerful KrF laser manufactured in the 21st century last week. This laser is vital for the operation of the "Phoenix" project which aims to advance laser fusion technology.

data.title: ICE Mortgage Technology released November 2025 mortgage delinquency data, showing a sharp increase due to calendar factors.
data.description: In a recent report released today, ICE Mortgage Technology unveiled the November 2025 ICE First Look report on mortgage delinquency, foreclosure, and prepayment trends. The report, which is a part of Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), highlighted a notable rise in delinquency numbers. According to Andy Walden, the spokesperson for ICE Mortgage Technology, these spikes were attributed to scheduled payments not posting until early December due to November ending on a Sunday. Although the specific figures were not provided, the data suggests a substantial increase in delinquencies for this period.

data.title: ATOM expected to reach $2.10-$2.20 by Jan 2026, with 8-13% upside in 4-6 weeks, backed by bullish indicators.
data.description: Forecasting for ATOM suggests a possible increase of 8-13%, reaching a range of $2.10-$2.20 in the next 4-6 weeks. This prediction is backed by bullish MACD divergence and oversold RSI conditions close to crucial support levels.

data.title: Experiential gifts create stronger emotional connections, study shows. Researchers suggest Christmas gifting takes a new turn.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Los Angeles, a study published in the Journal of Consumer Research highlighted that gift-giving during the holidays has evolved beyond mere physical presents. The research indicates that experiential gifts are more effective in evoking profound emotional reactions and nurturing closer connections between individuals. This research emphasizes the significance of thoughtful experiences over material possessions during the holiday season.
